special_mechanics.name: Deathtrap Escape Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Game features trap-escape/problem-solving sequences where Nightshade must escape from deathtraps placed by Sutekh, inspired by James Bond films. First four traps have solutions; final trap forces game restart.

special_mechanics.name: Quick Button Response Combat
special_mechanics.description: Fighting segments that required quick button responses from player input.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game reception notes 'complicated, yet not adjustable controls' but no quantitative movement data provided. Sources focus on game design, plot, and development history rather than technical physics implementation.
